steps.title: Find the central comparison
steps.content: Yung Wing contrasts New York in 1847 with New York in 1909. He describes the earlier city as much smaller and the later city as a metropolis with skyscrapers, churches, and palatial residences.

steps.title: Separate main idea from details
steps.content: Choice A shifts to Yung's personal growth. Choice C focuses on the voyage, and Choice D turns a comparison with London into the main point. The remaining choice captures New York's growth and development over time. The answer is B.
